name: harness
description: Canonical, stack-agnostic Claude Code harness: the /spec skill (goal -> researched GitHub issue ready for @claude) and the /reconcile-pr skill (detect drift, re-align & implement a stale PR), plus generic code-reviewer and test-runner subagents. Shared across all of JDSavvy's repos; each project tailors stack-specific bits (build/test commands, anti-mixing guard ref, app skills) locally.
